description: Develop a read-only integration test client (test-client.ts) that connects to the MCP server via stdio and invokes 'get_dispatch_state' and 'get_execution_diff' to validate the M3 Context API.
scope: Create 'src/mcp-server/src/test-client.ts'. The script must initialize an MCP client, connect to the local server, call the context tools, and print/assert the results. The goal is to prove an orchestrator/reviewer agent can fetch canonical workflow state and semantic diff context natively through MCP.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO modifications to the MCP server (src/mcp-server/src/index.ts). NO workflow mutation or write operations. NO approval automation or reviewer identity redesign. NO protocol evolution topics or changes to existing schema.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify the MCP server index.ts file.
Attempting to write to any artifact outside allowed_artifacts.
Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to implement state mutators or auto-approval logic.
Executing implementation before an explicit, independent contract review decision is provided.
